title: OYO Rooms is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)

jsonLd.title: OYO Rooms is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the OYO Rooms family as a E-commerce Executive in Bhopal. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About OYO Rooms:
OYO Rooms is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with OYO Rooms!
